equivalent_mutants_documented.rationale: ConfigDict kwarg rename (e.g., extra -> extraXX, frozen -> frozenXX, validate_assignment -> validate_assignmentXX): Pydantic ConfigDict silently ignores unknown keys, so the renamed kwarg is dropped and behaviour is unchanged. The ConfigDict() call defines validator configuration — pure data container with no inline behaviour.

excluded_paths: src/seharness/domain/enums.py (existing RunStatus / PhaseName strings — slice 1 contract, not touched by slice 4)
exclusion_rationale: Per SPEC §'Mandatory Mutation Testing', pure data containers with no inline behaviour may be excluded. ConfigDict kwarg renames are equivalent because Pydantic ignores unknown keys.
